title: Introduction to DSA
story_hook: You joined your first startup internship. The tech lead hands you a massive codebase and says: 'Find all duplicate user IDs.' You open the file — 10 million rows. Your for-loop crashes in 30 seconds. Welcome to DSA.
whatsapp_msg: Day 1: What is DSA and why should you care? 🚀 Let's build the foundation.

quiz.explanation: DSA stands for Data Structures and Algorithms — the building blocks of efficient software.

quiz.q: Which of the following is a data structure?
quiz.explanation: An Array is a data structure. Sorting, Recursion, and Loop are techniques or concepts.

options: A set of step-by-step instructions to solve a problem
quiz.explanation: An algorithm is a finite set of instructions that defines a procedure to solve a specific problem.

tasks.title: Write Your First Algorithm
tasks.description: Write a function in Java that takes an integer array and returns the sum of all elements. Analyze: how many steps does it take for N elements?
